contributor_note: Seeded from common horticultural knowledge. Needs primary source verification.

habit.note: Climbs to 1–1.5m — needs netting or twiggy sticks. Prefers cool weather.

notes: Prefers cool growing conditions — sow early (March–April) or late (August for autumn crop). Hates summer heat. Harvest daily when pods are plump. Nitrogen-fixing.
